spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  price_date AS time,
  close_price AS "Brent Close"
FROM app.oil_prices
WHERE benchmark_code = 'BRENT'
ORDER BY price_date;

SELECT
  s.source_name,
  COUNT(*) AS article_count
FROM app.articles_raw ar
JOIN app.articles_processed ap
  ON ap.article_id = ar.article_id
JOIN app.sources s
  ON s.source_id = ar.source_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))
  AND (
    '$news_source' = '__all'
    OR s.source_name = '$news_source'
  )
GROUP BY s.source_name
ORDER BY article_count DESC;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    DATE(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))::timestamp AS day,
    s.source_name,
    ap.sentiment_score,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(ap.relevance_score, 0), 1.0) AS weight
  FROM app.articles_raw ar
  JOIN app.sources s
    ON ar.source_id = s.source_id
  JOIN app.articles_processed ap
    ON ap.article_id = ar.article_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))
    AND ap.sentiment_score IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      '$news_source' = '__all'
      OR s.source_name = '$news_source'
    )
)
SELECT
  day AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS article_count,
  CASE
    WHEN '$sentiment_metric' = 'weighted_avg_sentiment'
      THEN SUM(sentiment_score * weight) / NULLIF(SUM(weight), 0)
    ELSE AVG(sentiment_score)
  END AS sentiment_value
FROM base
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day;

WITH latest_run AS (
  SELECT model_run_id
  FROM app.model_runs
  WHERE model_name = '$model_name'
    AND run_status = 'completed'
  ORDER BY finished_at DESC NULLS LAST, model_run_id DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
recent_preds AS (
  SELECT
    p.prediction_for_date AS time,
    p.actual_close AS "Actual",
    p.predicted_close AS "Predicted"
  FROM app.predictions p
  JOIN latest_run lr
    ON p.model_run_id = lr.model_run_id
  WHERE p.actual_close IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY p.prediction_for_date DESC
  LIMIT 7
)
SELECT *
FROM recent_preds
ORDER BY time;

WITH latest_run AS (
  SELECT model_run_id
  FROM app.model_runs
  WHERE model_name = '$model_name'
    AND run_status = 'completed'
  ORDER BY finished_at DESC NULLS LAST, model_run_id DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
latest_scored_pred AS (
  SELECT
    prediction_for_date,
    predicted_close,
    actual_close
  FROM app.predictions
  WHERE model_run_id = (SELECT model_run_id FROM latest_run)
    AND actual_close IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY prediction_for_date DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  ROUND(predicted_close::numeric, 2) AS "Predicted",
  ROUND(actual_close::numeric, 2) AS "Actual",
  ROUND(ABS(predicted_close - actual_close)::numeric, 2) AS "Error",
  TO_CHAR(prediction_for_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date"
FROM latest_scored_pred;

SELECT
  ROUND(mae::numeric, 2) AS "MAE",
  ROUND(rmse::numeric, 2) AS "RMSE"
FROM app.model_runs
WHERE model_name = '$model_name'
  AND run_status = 'completed'
ORDER BY finished_at DESC NULLS LAST, model_run_id DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  DATE(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))::timestamp AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS article_count,
  AVG(ap.sentiment_score) AS avg_sentiment
FROM app.articles_raw ar
JOIN app.articles_processed ap
  ON ap.article_id = ar.article_id
JOIN app.sources s
  ON s.source_id = ar.source_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))
  AND ap.sentiment_score IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    '$news_source' = '__all'
    OR s.source_name = '$news_source'
  )
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    DATE(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))::timestamp AS day,
    ap.sentiment_score,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(ap.relevance_score, 0), 1.0) AS weight
  FROM app.articles_raw ar
  JOIN app.articles_processed ap
    ON ap.article_id = ar.article_id
  JOIN app.sources s
    ON s.source_id = ar.source_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))
    AND ap.sentiment_score IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      '$news_source' = '__all'
      OR s.source_name = '$news_source'
    )
)
SELECT
  day AS time,
  AVG(sentiment_score) AS avg_sentiment,
  SUM(sentiment_score * weight) / NULLIF(SUM(weight), 0) AS weighted_sentiment
FROM base
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day;

SELECT
  COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at) AS published_time,
  s.source_name,
  ar.title,
  ap.sentiment_score,
  ap.relevance_score,
  ar.url
FROM app.articles_raw ar
JOIN app.articles_processed ap
  ON ap.article_id = ar.article_id
JOIN app.sources s
  ON s.source_id = ar.source_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))
  AND ap.sentiment_score IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    '$news_source' = '__all'
    OR s.source_name = '$news_source'
  )
ORDER BY ap.sentiment_score ASC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at) AS published_time,
  s.source_name,
  ar.title,
  ap.sentiment_score,
  ap.relevance_score,
  ar.url
FROM app.articles_raw ar
JOIN app.articles_processed ap
  ON ap.article_id = ar.article_id
JOIN app.sources s
  ON s.source_id = ar.source_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))
  AND ap.sentiment_score IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    '$news_source' = '__all'
    OR s.source_name = '$news_source'
  )
ORDER BY ap.sentiment_score DESC
LIMIT 10;
